name: Gastown Planning Domain Plugin
description: Official InkosAI plugin for the Gastown multi-agent workspace orchestration domain. Provides workspace management, agent coordination, and session persistence.
author: InkosAI

commands.name: initialize_workspace
commands.description: Initialize a new Gastown workspace with all required components

commands.name: list_agents
commands.description: List all agents in the current workspace

commands.name: coordinate_agents
commands.description: Coordinate multiple agents for a task

commands.name: check_session_health
commands.description: Check health of current agent session

commands.name: allocate_resources
commands.description: Allocate resources for a specific task
